overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along the Night City waterfront promenade on a sunny day. The player moves past palm trees and neon-lit commercial buildings toward a massive industrial tower, passing under a large billboard and approaching an industrial bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past shops and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera along the promenade

entered.detail: tall palm tree with green fronds lining the walkway
multi-story buildings with colorful neon signage and storefronts
metal railing separating the walkway from the water
tall cylindrical industrial tower with external scaffolding
dense collection of illuminated signs and advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward past palm trees and commercial buildings adorned with neon signs. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the orange-tiled path, while a massive industrial tower looms in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching the central tower with large elevated billboard

events.description: futuristic flying vehicles appear in the sky above the tower
camera tilts upward to focus on the tower and billboard structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade toward the tower with increasing focus on the skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the tower

entered.detail: large elevated billboard advertising REAL WATER with bottle image and green frame

segments.scene_description: The palm trees give way to an open view of the waterfront as the camera approaches a massive billboard structure. The industrial tower grows larger in the frame while flying vehicles traverse the sky above. The camera gradually tilts upward, emphasizing the scale of the tower and billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront edge under industrial billboard structure

events.description: camera moves under the billboard structure into a more industrial waterfront area
industrial building marked with 06 becomes prominent on the right

agents.ego_description: walking close to the water's edge under the billboard structure

notable_agents.action: figures sitting by the water's edge near the barrier

entered.detail: large metal bridge structure with suspension cables spanning the water
tall dark industrial building marked with white number 06
industrial suspension cables and rigging extending from the bridge

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the massive billboard structure, transitioning to a more industrial zone. The view opens to reveal a large bridge spanning the water and a massive industrial building marked '06' on the right. The camera tilts upward to take in the scale of the industrial architecture and suspension cables against the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a sunny waterfront promenade that transitions from a commercial district into a massive industrial zone. It begins by gliding past palm trees and neon-lit buildings on an orange-tiled path, with a distant industrial tower looming across the water. As the palm trees recede, the view opens up toward a colossal billboard and flying vehicles in the sky, while the camera tilts upward to emphasize the growing scale of the architecture. The scene then shifts as the camera passes under the billboard, moving into a starker industrial environment where a large bridge and a building marked 06 come into view. Finally, the camera tilts once more to capture the towering suspension cables and industrial structures against the bright, clear sky.
